parsed_review.summary: CP00-511 is a descriptor-only Risk-B governance-core (RP16) pack covering the 40 planned units RP16.P09.M04.S05-RP16.P09.M06.S02 (M04 Secondary Workflow Slice tail 16 rows, M05 Permission And Audit Binding full 22 rows, M06 Synthetic Fixture Set head 2 rows). Verified via Read/Grep/Glob: (1) registry binding (registry.js:528), requirements (registry.js:2663), and no-write attestation match the pack baseline and the deliverable/phase/micro distributions exactly (test2/ui2/impl27/claude_review6/security_audit2/hermes1; M04=16,M05=22,M06=2). (2) service.js factories (case set 3957, descriptor 3990, freezeCp511Result 3909) and validators.js (coverage 5650, descriptor 5685, hermes 5741, claude 5762, handoff 5785) enforce descriptor_only=true, runtime_execution=false, raw_payload=false, no state writes, no real data, and no governance/DLP/legal-hold/retention runtime. (3) Authority boundary holds: claude_is_final_approval=false, enterprise trust not claimed from local validation, human approval required to open runtime; Hermes appears only as a descriptor evidence packet (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false, no_hermes_runtime_receipt=true), not product runtime. (4) The rp16 validator deepEquals contract projections against factory outputs and the 31 prior-pack current_pack drift allow-lists (CP480-CP510) plus CP511's strict self-check are all present; contract current_pack/program/descriptor/historical bindings resolve to CP00-511. (5) Manifest is descriptor-layer with production_ready=false and runtime_ready=false (no runtime overclaim), and next-pack-queue.json confirms CP00-511 is the live head after CP00-510. Review hardening is sound: readiness auth preflight passed (exit 0, 1436-byte valid JSON, non-empty), prompt 2243B<25600B with read_tools_used and no embedded full diff, tools restricted to Read/Grep/Glob, summary-only correctly prohibited for a Risk-B pack carrying security/audit and review deliverables. Scope note: as a read-only reviewer I verified by source consistency rather than by re-executing the command-evidence (all claimed exit 0); the unrelated dirty files (progress-control-room, workbook/*, docx) are correctly excluded from active pack scope; post-review artifacts (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json) are expectedly absent at review time and must be produced and confirmed by closeout-pack:validate before commit. No P0/P1/P2/P3 defects found.
